items.claim: Kamaru Usman's knees are deteriorating due to his age.
Dricus Du Plessis has a history of being taken down by multiple opponents.
items.quote: we've seen tons of guys take him down throughout the years.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is stiff on the feet and does not move his head off the center line.
items.quote: Usman is so stiff on the feet... Doesn't move his head off that center line.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis is physically stiff and rigid in his fighting style.
items.quote: Du Plessis is also super stiff, rigid

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis has a significant age advantage over Kamaru Usman.
items.quote: what I think favors Dricus is the age.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is 42 years old and is experiencing a physical decline.
items.quote: You're 42 years old, bro. Like, what do you expect, man? You're going to fall off a cliff.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is ultra durable.
items.quote: CLD has proven to be ultra durable

items.claim: Jared Cannonier lacks durability at this stage of his career.
items.quote: Cannonier hasn't [proven to be ultra durable].

items.claim: Chase Hooper's chin is starting to deteriorate.
items.quote: His chin is starting to go.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is a heavy hitter.
items.quote: I think that he's a pretty heavy hitter.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has had a full training camp for this fight.
items.quote: he's not taking this fight on short notice, so he's had a full camp.
